description: Atlantis USD (USDA) is the native and official USD stablecoin on AtlantisChain — the world’s only ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain. It is directly pegged to U.S. dollar-related assets and fully backed 1:1 by USD, U.S. Treasury bills, Treasury bonds, and USD-denominated stablecoins or crypto assets, ensuring that each USDA consistently maintains parity with one U.S. dollar while supporting deep on-chain liquidity across the entire Atlantis Kingdom ecosystem.
name: Atlantis USD
